title: Kitchen display freezes when a new order arrives
body:
When a new order comes in while the kitchen display is open, the screen freezes for ~5 seconds and the new ticket doesn't show until you refresh.

Steps to reproduce:
1. Open /kitchen on the iPad
2. Place a test order from /order/demo-pizza-palace
3. Watch the kitchen display — it hangs, then the ticket appears only after a manual refresh

Expected: the new ticket appears automatically within the 4s poll.
